'''Munch-fungus bread''' was bread cooked with [[Munch-fungus/Legends|munch-fungus]]. At [[Mal'aa's Kitchens]], a [[Kala'uun/Legends|Kala'uun]] restaurant, it was served as a side dish to [[rycrit stew]].

{{Food-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Munch-fungus bread was first introduced to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe in the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|''Star Wars'' roleplaying game]] book ''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]'', written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] and published by [[West End Games]] in [[February]] [[1995]].
